Confidence: Veracity Signal"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne v2.3 adds a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"veracity"}]," field to every memory so you know how trustworthy it is. Not all memories are created equal: something you explicitly stated deserves more weight than something the AI inferred from context."]}],"\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22"],["$L23"],"$L24"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@25"]},null,false,"$@25"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L26",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$27",["$L28"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"v6Kf9s5SloHrNZ9g_EFZI"}
29:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"OutletBoundary"]
2a:"$Sreact.suspense"
2d:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
2f:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Confidence Levels"}]
8:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Level"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Meaning"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Weight"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"stated"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"You explicitly said this"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"1.0x"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"inferred"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"AI deduced from context"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.7x"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"tool"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Automated system output"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.5x"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"imported"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Cross-provider import"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.6x"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"unknown"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Legacy or uncategorized"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.8x"}]]}]]}]]}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Why It Matters"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"AI agents store a lot of inferred and tool-generated memories. Over time, these can drown out what you actually said. Veracity lets you:"}]
b:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Weight direct user statements higher than AI inferences in recall"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Filter queries to only your explicit preferences"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Review and audit inferred memories periodically"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Track contamination in your memory system"}],"\n"]}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Without veracity signals, a joke you made about liking Haskell could rank equally with your explicit preference for Python."}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Writing With Confidence"}]
e:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"# Explicit user statement\nmem.remember(\"Dark mode is preferred\", veracity=\"stated\")\n\n# AI inference\nmem.remember(\"User likely prefers dark mode based on theme choices\", veracity=\"inferred\")\n\n# Tool output\nmem.remember(\"Deploy succeeded at 3:14 PM\", veracity=\"tool\")\n"}]}]
f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Recalling With Confidence Filters"}]
10:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"# Only get things I explicitly said\nresults = mem.recall(\"preference\", veracity=\"stated\")\n\n# Only tool outputs\nresults = mem.recall(\"deploy\", veracity=\"tool\")\n\n# Everything, unfiltered\nresults = mem.recall(\"preference\")  # no veracity filter\n"}]}]
11:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How Recall Weighting Works"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":["During ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}],", each result's score gets multiplied by its veracity weight:"]}]
13:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["A ",["$","code",null,{"children":"stated"}]," memory with score 0.9 stays 0.9"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["An ",["$","code",null,{"children":"inferred"}]," memory with score 0.9 becomes 0.63"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["A ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tool"}]," memory becomes 0.45"]}],"\n"]}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":"Inferred memories need to be much more semantically relevant to surface above stated ones. The system still surfaces inferences when they're genuinely relevant, but they start at a disadvantage."}]
15:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"get_contaminated(): Audit Your Memory"}]
16:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"# Get all non-stated memories for review\ncontaminated = mem.get_contaminated(limit=50)\n\nfor m in contaminated:\n    print(f\"[{m['veracity']}] {m['content'][:100]}\")\n    # Review and optionally promote\n"}]}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns episodic memories where veracity is NOT ",["$","code",null,{"children":"stated"}],". Sorted by importance descending so the most impactful contamination surfaces first."]}]
18:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Configuration"}]
19:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"MNEMOSYNE_STATED_WEIGHT=1.0\nMNEMOSYNE_INFERRED_WEIGHT=0.7\nMNEMOSYNE_TOOL_WEIGHT=0.5\nMNEMOSYNE_IMPORTED_WEIGHT=0.6\nMNEMOSYNE_UNKNOWN_WEIGHT=0.8\n"}]}]
1a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Migration"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":["New databases get the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"veracity"}]," column via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CREATE TABLE"}],". Existing databases get it via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ALTER TABLE"}]," migration in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"init_beam()"}],". All existing rows default to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"unknown"}],". No data loss, fully backward compatible."]}]
1c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Combined With Tiers"}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Veracity and tier degradation work together:"}]
1e:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["A tier-3 (cold) + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"stated"}],": 0.25 x 1.0 = 0.25 total weight"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["A tier-3 (cold) + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tool"}],": 0.25 x 0.5 = 0.125 total weight"]}],"\n"]}]
1f:["$","p",null,{"children":"You control both dimensions independently."}]
20:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Practical Example: Preference Cleanup"}]
21:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"# I told my agent: \"I prefer Python over JavaScript\"\nmem.remember(\"User prefers Python over JavaScript\", veracity=\"stated\")\n\n# Agent later inferred: \"User seems to like Haskell\" based on a joke\nmem.remember(\"User seems to like Haskell\", veracity=\"inferred\")\n\n# Four days later...\nwhat_i_said = mem.recall(\"language preference\", veracity=\"stated\")\n# Returns my real preference, not the joke-inference\n\n# Quarterly audit\nsuspect = mem.get_contaminated()\nfor s in suspect:\n    if confirm_with_user(s[\"content\"]):\n        mem.update(s[\"id\"], veracity=\"stated\")\n    else:\n        mem.forget(s[\"id\"])\n"}]}]
22:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Audit tip:"}]," Run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"get_contaminated()"}]," as part of a weekly or monthly cleanup. Inferred memories pile up quietly. A quick audit keeps your memory system aligned with what you actually believe and prefer."]}]
23:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/12r39sjxj5pr8.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]
24:["$","$L29",null,{"children":["$","$2a",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@2b"}]}]
2c:[]

28:["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/0d7tmf3wmgstl.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}]

32:I[72,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"IconMark"]

30:[["$","title","0",{"children":"Memory Confidence - Veracity Signal"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"description","content":"Learn how Mnemosyne's veracity signal tracks memory trustworthiness, weights recall results by confidence level, and lets you audit non-stated memories with get_contaminated()."}],["$","link","2",{"rel":"author","href":"https://github.com/axdsan"}],["$","meta","3",{"name":"author","content":"Abdias Moya"}],["$","meta","4",{"name":"keywords","content":"AI memory,agent memory,persistent memory,BEAM,Mnemosyne,SQLite,vector search,Hermes plugin"}],["$","meta","5",{"name":"robots","content":"index, follow"}],["$","link","6",{"rel":"canonical","href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site"}],["$","meta","7",{"property":"og:title","content":"Memory Confidence - Veracity Signal"}],["$","meta","8",{"property":"og:description","content":"Learn how Mnemosyne's veracity signal tracks memory trustworthiness, weights recall results by confidence level, and lets you audit non-stated memories with get_contaminated()."}],["$","meta","9",{"property":"og:image","content":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/og-image.svg"}],["$","meta","10",{"name":"twitter:card","content":"summary_large_image"}],["$","meta","11",{"name":"twitter:title","content":"Memory Confidence - Veracity Signal"}],["$","meta","12",{"name":"twitter:description","content":"Learn how Mnemosyne's veracity signal tracks memory trustworthiness, weights recall results by confidence level, and lets you audit non-stated memories with get_contaminated()."}],["$","meta","13",{"name":"twitter:image","content":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/og-image.svg"}],["$","link","14",{"rel":"icon","href":"/favicon.ico?favicon.0x3dzn~oxb6tn.ico","sizes":"256x256","type":"image/x-icon"}],["$","$L32","15",{}]]
